ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size number representing the standard size */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size representation */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size representation */,
  "fr_size" TEXT /* French size representation */,
  "it_size" TEXT /* Italian size representation */,
  "au_size" TEXT /* Australian size representation */,
  "jp_size" TEXT /* Japanese size representation */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Link to the style of the clothing to which the size applies */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the size standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (country) where the size standard applies */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Link to the size standard for this product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Men’s, Women’s, Kids) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing product */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Link to the style of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the product was sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of sale */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale (price * quantity - discount) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, retailer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Link to the size standard that was updated */,
  "previous_size" TEXT /* Previous size representation before the update */,
  "updated_size" TEXT /* New size representation after the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_histories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_histories_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_id")
)
